=======================================================================
USB Transport Controller — Class Request & Bulk Transfer Decompilation
Firmware: Canon IXUS 870 IS / SD880 IS, version 1.01a
Generated by DecompileUSBTransport.java (Ghidra headless)
Focus: ClassRequest handler, AsyncWrite, BulkTrns
=======================================================================

KEY QUESTIONS:
1. Can we hook the class request dispatcher for UVC requests?
2. Can AsyncWriteUSBDataPipeMulti stream video frames through bulk EP?
3. What is the bulk transfer buffer management model?
4. How are endpoints opened/configured for data transfer?

=======================================================================
SECTION 1: Transport Functions (via string xrefs)
=======================================================================
